title: Software-DSM in monday.com - Approaches?

posts.author: ll4mat (Knecht Rootrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There

Since we use monday.com (among others) for SW-Developement / SW-Packaging i’m looking for a way to capture and visualize software-dependencys. The dependency column appears to be permanently linked to a date and seems therefore not suitable for this purpose.

I am explicitly looking for a way to display software dependencies.
Something rudimentary in this direction: Dependency Structure Matrix

Any ideas?
